title: erigeron stuessyi
intro: Erigeron stuessyi, also known as Stuessi's fleabane or Stuessi's daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, and has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Erigeron stuessyi include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
